{/* LEFT */}
Trusted Daily Worker Hiring Platform

Hire Skilled Workers
Easily & Quickly

Connect customers with trusted labour workers. Book workers, manage requests, negotiate pricing, and schedule jobs effortlessly.

{/* AUTH CARD */}

Get Started

Login or create an account as customer or labour.

{/* RIGHT */}

Popular Services

⚡ Electrician

Electrical repairs

🚿 Plumber

Pipe & bathroom work

🎨 Painter

Interior & exterior

🪚 Carpenter

Wood & furniture work

🧹 Cleaner

House cleaning services

🛠 Technician

Repair & maintenance

{/* FEATURES */}

Why Choose DailyWorker?

🔍 Smart Search

Find workers by skill and work type.

📅 Flexible Scheduling

Choose preferred work dates and timings.

💰 Transparent Pricing

Labour can send custom pricing offers.

✅ Live Request Tracking

Track every booking request in real-time.

); } const styles = { page: { background: "#f4f7fb", minHeight: "100vh", fontFamily: "Arial" }, heroSection: { display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "center", padding: "70px", gap: "40px" }, left: { width: "50%" }, badge: { background: "#dbeafe", color: "#2563eb", display: "inline-block", padding: "10px 18px", borderRadius: "30px", marginBottom: "25px", fontSize: "14px" }, heading: { fontSize: "60px", lineHeight: "75px", color: "#111827" }, description: { color: "#6b7280", lineHeight: "32px", fontSize: "18px", marginTop: "25px", marginBottom: "35px" }, authCard: { background: "white", padding: "30px", borderRadius: "20px", boxShadow: "0 10px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)" }, authTitle: { marginBottom: "10px" }, authText: { color: "#6b7280", marginBottom: "20px" }, btnRow: { display: "flex", gap: "15px" }, loginBtn: { flex: 1, background: "#2563eb", color: "white", border: "none", padding: "15px", borderRadius: "10px", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "15px" }, registerBtn: { flex: 1, background: "#22c55e", color: "white", border: "none", padding: "15px", borderRadius: "10px", cursor: "pointer", fontSize: "15px" }, right: { width: "45%" }, heroCard: { background: "white", borderRadius: "24px", padding: "35px", boxShadow: "0 12px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)" }, cardHeading: { marginBottom: "25px" }, serviceGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(2,1fr)", gap: "18px" }, serviceCard: { background: "#f9fafb", padding: "20px", borderRadius: "16px" }, featureSection: { padding: "60px 70px" }, featureHeading: { textAlign: "center", marginBottom: "40px", fontSize: "42px" }, featureGrid: { display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr))", gap: "25px" }, featureCard: { background: "white", padding: "30px", borderRadius: "18px", textAlign: "center", boxShadow: "0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)" } };
